Bash(python -c "
from livekit.agents import AgentSession
import inspect

# Get all event types from AgentSession
print\(''=== AgentSession events ===''\)
for name, method in inspect.getmembers\(AgentSession\):
    if name.startswith\(''on_''\):
        print\(f''  - {name}''\)

# Check what events can be used with .on\(\)
print\(\)
print\(''=== Checking _emitter events ===''\)
session = AgentSession.__new__\(AgentSession\)
if hasattr\(session, ''_events''\) or hasattr\(AgentSession, ''_events''\):
    print\(''Has _events''\)

# Try to find event names from the source
import livekit.agents as agents
print\(\)
print\(''=== Checking agents module for events ===''\)
for name in dir\(agents\):
    if ''Event'' in name or ''event'' in name.lower\(\):
        print\(f''  - {name}''\)
")
